steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"import math
# Given data from ISA Energia December 2024
price = 31.91
shares = 658_883_304
# Balance sheet (Dec 31, 2024)
AT_total = 43_304_631_000.0  # Ativo Total
CA = 7_939_449_000.0        # Ativo Circulante
CL = 3_264_818_000.0        # Passivo Circulante
cash = 2_914_747_000.0        # Disponibilidades
# Debt
debt_current = 1_203_990_000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos (short-term)
debt_noncurrent = 12_069_814_000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos (long-term)
debt_gross = debt_current + debt_noncurrent
# Equity
equity = 20_228_226_000.0  # Patrimônio Líquido Consolidado
# Revenue and Profit (Last 12 months via 2024-12-31 data)
revenue_12m = 10_207_135_000.0  # Receita líquida (assume total receita 12m)
gross_profit_12m = 3_737_461_000.0
EBIT_12m = 5_131_278_000.0
net_income_12m = 3_552_731_000.0
# 12m Depreciation & Amortization (D&A)
D&A_12m = 37_357_000.0  # assumed from 9m value scaled; approximate
EBITDA_12m = EBIT_12m + D&A_12m
# 3 months (Q4 2024) derived from 12m - 9m figures
rev_9m = 7_387_225_000.0
EBIT_9m = 4_002_768_000.0
NI_9m = 2_327_762_000.0
rev_3m = revenue_12m - rev_9m
EBIT_3m = EBIT_12m - EBIT_9m
NI_3m = net_income_12m - NI_9m
# modest D&A for 3m approx: assume 3m D&A = (D&A_12m) * (3/12) = 9,339,? but we will use 3m D&A proportional to 12m if unknown
D&A_3m = (D&A_12m) * (3/12)
EBITDA_3m = EBIT_3m + D&A_3m
# Derived ratios
market_cap = price * shares
net_debt = debt_gross - cash
EV = market_cap + net_debt
LPA_12m = net_income_12m / shares
VPA = equity / shares
P_E = price / (net_income_12m / shares)
P_LTM = P_E  # placeholder
P_to_VP = price / VPA
P_to_EBIT = price / (EBIT_12m / shares)
PSR_12m = market_cap / revenue_12m
P_to_Assets = price / (AT_total / shares)
CapGiro = (CA - CL) / shares
P_to_CapGiro = price / CapGiro
P_to_AtivCircLiq = price / CapGiro  # same as CapGiro for this simplified calc
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA_12m
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12m
LPA_12m, VPA, P_E, P_to_VP, P_to_EBIT, PSR_12m
# Margins
margin_bruta = gross_profit_12m / revenue_12m
margin_EBIT = EBIT_12m / revenue_12m
margin_liquida = net_income_12m / revenue_12m
EBIT_ATIVO = EBIT_12m / AT_total
ROIC = EBIT_12m / (AT_total -  (CA - CL))  # approximate: EBIT / (Assets - suppliers - cash) but easier: use (AT - Fornecedores - Caixa)
# We'll compute ROE
ROE = net_income_12m / equity
# Liquidity ratio
liquidity_corr = (CA - CL) / CL
Divo = debt_gross / equity
Giro_Ativos = revenue_12m / AT_total
LPA12 = net_income_12m / shares
VPA12 = equity / shares
ROIC_calc = EBIT_12m / (AT_total - (620e6) - cash)  # skip complex; placeholder
print("market_cap=", market_cap)
print("EV=", EV)
print("LPA12=", LPA12)
print("VPA=", VPA)
print("P/L=", price / (net_income_12m / shares))
print("P/VP=", P_to_VP)
print("P/EBIT=", price / (EBIT_12m / shares))
print("PSR=", market_cap / revenue_12m)
print("P/Assets=", price / (AT_total / shares))
print("CapGiro=", CapGiro, " P_to_CapGiro=", P_to_CapGiro)
print("EV/ EBITDA=", EV_EBITDA)
print("EV/ EBIT=", EV_EBIT)
print("LPA (12m)=", LPA_12m)
print("LPA (3m)=", NI_3m / shares)
print("Giro Ativos=", Giro_Ativos )
print("Marg Bruta=", margin_bruta)
print("Marg EBIT=", margin_EBIT)
print("Marg Líquida=", margin_liquida)
print("ROE=", ROE)
print("ROIC=", 12.8)
print("Liquidez Corr=", liquidity_corr)
print("Div Br/ Patrim=", debt_gross / equity)
print("EBIT / Ativo=", EBIT_12m / AT_total)
print("Giro Ativos=", Giro_Ativos)
"} }

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"import math
price = 31.91
shares = 658_883_304
# Balance sheet (Dec 31, 2024)
AT_total = 43_304_631_000.0
CA = 7_939_449_000.0
CL = 3_264_818_000.0
cash = 2_914_747_000.0
# Debt
debt_current = 1_203_990_000.0
debt_noncurrent = 12_069_814_000.0
debt_gross = debt_current + debt_noncurrent
# Equity
equity = 20_228_226_000.0
# Revenue and Profit (12 months)
rev_12m = 10_207_135_000.0
gross_profit_12m = 3_737_461_000.0
EBIT_12m = 5_131_278_000.0
net_income_12m = 3_552_731_000.0
D&A_12m = 37_357_000.0  # assumed depreciation/amortization for year
EBITDA_12m = EBIT_12m + D&A_12m
# 9 months data (to compute 3 months deltas)
rev_9m = 7_387_225_000.0
EBIT_9m = 4_002_768_000.0
NI_9m = 2_327_762_000.0
# 3 months delta (Q4 2024):
rev_3m = rev_12m - rev_9m
EBIT_3m = EBIT_12m - EBIT_9m
NI_3m = net_income_12m - NI_9m
D&A_3m = (D&A_12m) * (3/12.0)
EBITDA_3m = EBIT_3m + D&A_3m
# Market metrics
market_cap = price * shares
net_debt = debt_gross - cash
EV = market_cap + net_debt
# Valuations per share
EPS_12m = net_income_12m / shares
LPA = EPS_12m
VPA = equity / shares
P_E12m = price / EPS_12m
PSR_12m = market_cap / rev_12m
P_to_Assets = price / (AT_total / shares)
CapGiro = (CA - CL) / shares
P_to_CapGiro = price / CapGiro
P_to_AtivCircLiq = price / CapGiro
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA_12m
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12m
# Margins
margin_bruta = gross_profit_12m / rev_12m
margin_EBIT = EBIT_12m / rev_12m
margin_liquida = net_income_12m / rev_12m
# ROE/ROIC
ROE = net_income_12m / equity
ROIC = EBIT_12m / (AT_total - (CA - CL) - cash)  # approximate
# Liquidity
liquidity_corr = (CA - CL) / CL
DivBrPatrim = debt_gross / equity
GiroAtivos = rev_12m / AT_total
LPA_12m = EPS_12m
LPA_3m = NI_3m / shares
P_L  = price / (NI_12m / shares) if 'NI_12m' in globals() else None
EPS_3m = NI_3m / shares
P_L_3m = price / (EPS_3m)
P_EBIT_3m = price / (EBIT_3m / shares)
# Print computed numbers
print("Market Cap:", market_cap)
print("EV:", EV)
print("LPA (12m):", LPA_12m)
print("VPA:", VPA)
print("P/L (12m):", P_E12m)
print("PSR (12m):", PSR_12m)
print("P/Ativos:", P_to_Assets)
print("CapGiro:", CapGiro, "P/CapGiro:", P_to_CapGiro)
print("EV/EBITDA:", EV_EBITDA)
print("EV/EBIT:", EV_EBIT)
print("Margins - Bruta/EBIT/Líquida:", margin_bruta, margin_EBIT, margin_liquida)
print("ROE:", ROE, "ROIC:", ROIC)
print("Giro Ativos:", GiroAtivos)
print("Liquidity Corr:", liquidity_corr)
print("Dív Br/ Patrim:", DivBrPatrim)
print("EBIT/ Ativo:", EBIT_12m / AT_total)
print("P/VP:", price / VPA)
print("P/EBIT (12m):", price / (EBIT_12m / shares))
print("P/Ativos:", P_to_Assets)
print("LPA (3m):", LPA_3m, "P/L 3m:", P_L_3m)
print("Receita 3m:", rev_3m)
print("EBIT 3m:", EBIT_3m)
print("NI 3m:", NI_3m)
print("EBITDA 12m:", EBITDA_12m)
print("EBITDA 3m:", EBITDA_3m)
print("EV/EBITDA 3m:", (EV) / EBITDA_3m)
print("EV/EBIT 3m:", EV / EBIT_3m)
print()
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

{"inp":{"code":"price = 31.91
shares = 658_883_304
AT_total = 43_304_631_000.0
CA = 7_939_449_000.0
CL = 3_264_818_000.0
cash = 2_914_747_000.0

debt_current = 1_203_990_000.0
debt_noncurrent = 12_069_814_000.0
debt_gross = debt_current + debt_noncurrent

equity = 20_228_226_000.0
rev_12m = 10_207_135_000.0
gross_profit_12m = 3_737_461_000.0
EBIT_12m = 5_131_278_000.0
net_income_12m = 3_552_731_000.0
DA_12m = 37_357_000.0
EBITDA_12m = EBIT_12m + DA_12m

rev_9m = 7_387_225_000.0
EBIT_9m = 4_002_768_000.0
NI_9m = 2_327_762_000.0
rev_3m = rev_12m - rev_9m
EBIT_3m = EBIT_12m - EBIT_9m
NI_3m = net_income_12m - NI_9m
DA_3m = DA_12m * (3/12.0)
EBITDA_3m = EBIT_3m + DA_3m

market_cap = price * shares
net_debt = debt_gross - cash
EV = market_cap + net_debt

EPS_12m = net_income_12m / shares
LPA = EPS_12m
VPA = equity / shares
P_E12m = price / EPS_12m
PSR_12m = market_cap / rev_12m
P_to_Assets = price / (AT_total / shares)
CapGiro = (CA - CL) / shares
P_to_CapGiro = price / CapGiro
P_to_AtivCircLiq = price / CapGiro
EBITDA_12m
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA_12m
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12m
margin_bruta = gross_profit_12m / rev_12m
margin_EBIT = EBIT_12m / rev_12m
margin_liquida = net_income_12m / rev_12m
ROE = net_income_12m / equity
ROIC = EBIT_12m / (AT_total - (CA - CL) - cash)
liquidity_corr = (CA - CL) / CL
DivBrPatrim = debt_gross / equity
GiroAtivos = rev_12m / AT_total
LPA_12m = EPS_12m
LPA_3m = NI_3m / shares
P_L12m = price / EPS_12m
P_L3m = price / (NI_3m / shares)
P_EBIT12m = price / (EBIT_12m / shares)
P_EBIT3m = price / (EBIT_3m / shares)

print("Market Cap:", market_cap)
print("EV:", EV)
print("LPA (12m):", LPA_12m)
print("VPA:", VPA)
print("P/L (12m):", P_E12m)
print("PSR (12m):", PSR_12m)
print("P/Ativos:", P_to_Assets)
print("CapGiro:", CapGiro, "P/CapGiro:", P_to_CapGiro)
print("EV/EBITDA:", EV_EBITDA)
print("EV/EBIT:", EV_EBIT)
print("Margins - Bruta/EBIT/Líquida:", margin_bruta, margin_EBIT, margin_liquida)
print("ROE:", ROE, "ROIC:", ROIC)
print("Giro Ativos:", GiroAtivos)
print("Liquidity Corr:", liquidity_corr)
print("Dív Br/ Patrim:", DivBrPatrim)
print("EBIT / Ativo:", EBIT_12m / AT_total)
print("P/VP:", price / VPA)
print("P/EBIT (12m):", P_EBIT12m)
print("P/Ativos:", P_to_Assets)
print("LPA (3m):", LPA_3m, "P/L 3m:", P_L3m)
print("Receita 3m:", rev_3m)
print("EBIT 3m:", EBIT_3m)
print("NI 3m:", NI_3m)
print("EBITDA 12m:", EBITDA_12m)
print("EBITDA 3m:", EBITDA_3m)
print("EV/EBITDA 3m:", EV / EBITDA_3m)
print("EV/EBIT 3m:", EV / EBIT_3m)
"} }
